title: RelifeDragon
description: Fantasy modpack with the best optimization. RelifeDragon has excellent visuals, with 6 classes, new villages with new biomes both in caves and above and 12+ bosses
body:
Relife Dragons is a modpax with the best optimization, improving the vanilla experience and adding a lot of fantasy content. 9 RAM recommended
## Optimization
Better optimization allows you to play with stable performance on any PC. It is recommended to allocate 9 RAM
## Cooking
Create a variety of dishes with the Farmer's Delight mod and its addons
## Tetra
Tetra mod allows you to experiment with your weapons, right-click on the workbench and put your weapon there
## Capture your moments on camera
You can take pictures and frame your photos with the camera. Mod-Exposure
## Visual
Great visuals will provide a more enjoyable gameplay
## Bosses
Fight 12 new bosses
## Rpg classes
The modpack contains 6 classes: archer, mage, warrior, rogue, paladin, priest.
## World
The modpack has a beautiful world with new exciting dungeons and beautiful biomes.
## New mechanics
Now your character will experience cold and heat.
## Plans for the future
Add guide book
